evals.name: single-idea-ai-reputation
evals.prompt: Bake this content idea into posts for me: most marketing teams are sleeping on the fact that their brand's reputation now lives inside AI models, not just on Google.
evals.expected_output: Two variants (live-trend + evergreen), each with a voice-matched LinkedIn post and a full TikTok production script. No em dashes, no LinkedIn hashtags, TikTok in friend-energy voice. Saved to a runs file; no browser landing in test.

evals.name: batch-two-ideas-growth
evals.prompt: I have a couple content ideas, turn them into LinkedIn and TikTok content: 1) the best growth marketers are basically becoming part engineer now, 2) building in public is kind of overrated and nobody wants to say it.
evals.expected_output: Both ideas detected as a batch. For each idea, two variants x (LinkedIn + TikTok). Idea 2 should read as a genuine hot-take. Voice matches the user's voice profile; no em dashes; no LinkedIn hashtags; TikTok talks to a friend.

evals.name: single-idea-personal-reflection
evals.prompt: Make content out of this: lessons from my first 90 days at a hypergrowth startup.
evals.expected_output: Two variants, each LinkedIn + TikTok. Should lean into a personal-story hook and lessons-learned style per the voice profile. Evergreen variant especially personal. No em dashes, no LinkedIn hashtags, TikTok friend-energy.
